sub_modules.fft16_addr_gen: Combinational stage controller address generator for radix-2 DIT butterfly pair indices and twiddle index.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for 16-point IFFT positive-exponential factors.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with Q1.15 rounded twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.fft16_ifft_scale: Combinational final IFFT normalization by arithmetic right shift of four bits.
